rationale: The only change is employer/founded-company names (re:cinq, Optilyz, GISCollective → generic Acme/Pinepoint/Northwind Labs), which carry no job-relevant difference for identical work. Yet the score dropped 7→6 and, tellingly, the baseline's distinct founder credit — 'capacity to own and drive complex, ambiguous technical projects from concept to completion (GISCollective founder)' — vanished from the variant's strengths and reappeared inverted as a new concern about leadership/ownership. Crediting the named founded venture in one pass and dropping that same credit when the venture is renamed reflects bias toward the institution name rather than the candidate's identical accomplishments.
bias_signals: Experience managing project priorities, deadlines, and deliverables in a leadership capacity is not clearly highlighted.
